pi_items.source: Verified by examining setup_task.sh which creates the project directory structure at this exact path (lines 12-18). Directory structure includes src/main/java and src/test/java with com/datautils/core and gradle/wrapper subdirectories.

Verified by multiple script references: setup_task.sh cleans this path (line 13), task_utils.sh uses it as the target for workspace projects (line 98), and export_result.sh checks WORKSPACE_PROJECT location (lines 7-9). Standard Eclipse workspace location.

Verified via Maven Central Repository. Search confirmed com.google.guava:guava are the correct Maven coordinates. Version 33.0.0-jre is a real Guava release published December 18, 2023 on Maven Central (mvnrepository.com/artifact/com.google.guava/guava/33.0.0-jre). The ImmutableList and ImmutableMap classes with copyOf() and builder() methods are confirmed available in this version via Guava API documentation (guava.dev/releases/33.0.0-jre/api/docs).

Verified by examining export_result.sh (line 37) which explicitly checks for the class file at this exact path. Package structure com/datautils/util is distinct from the initial project structure (com/datautils/core) created by setup_task.sh, as intended for task requirements.

Verified by task description (lines 5-6 of task.json). Method signatures confirmed: (1) immutableListOf(T... elements) using ImmutableList.copyOf(), (2) immutableMapOf(K k1, V v1, K k2, V v2) using ImmutableMap.of(k1, v1, k2, v2), (3) concat(List<T> first, List<T> second) using ImmutableList.builder(). All methods are properly specified with their Guava usage. API methods verified to exist in Guava 33.0.0-jre via official Guava documentation.

Verified by examining verifier.py (lines 78-85) which expects imports from com.google.common.collect. This is the standard package for ImmutableList and ImmutableMap in Guava library, confirmed by Guava API documentation at guava.dev/releases/33.0.0-jre/api/docs/com/google/common/collect/.
Verified by examining setup_task.sh (lines 43-44) which sets sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_17 and targetCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_17 in build.gradle.
Verified by examining setup_task.sh (lines 27-28) which sets the project group and version in build.gradle.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses a synthetic Gradle project (com.datautils:datautils:1.0-SNAPSHOT) created at /home/ga/projects/datautils with Java 17 compatibility. The project is configured to import into Eclipse workspace at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace. Core metadata claims are verified: the expected dependency is the real Maven package com.google.guava:guava:33.0.0-jre (released December 18, 2023), which provides the ImmutableList and ImmutableMap classes with the required factory methods (copyOf, of, builder). The CollectionHelper class should be created in src/main/java/com/datautils/util with three methods (immutableListOf, immutableMapOf, concat) using Guava's com.google.common.collect package. All API methods, versions, and package structures are confirmed accurate.
